welcomeDesc: Your smart fat loss assistant to manage calories and reach your goal weight
noPlanDesc: Tap the button above and AI will create a personalized plan for you
onlineModeDesc: Use online AI service, requires internet
localModeDesc: Use on-device local model, fully offline
autoModeDesc: Prefer online, auto-switch to local when offline
onlineFailedHint: Online model unavailable, switched to local model
systemPrompt: You are a professional nutritionist and fitness coach. Create a personalized fat loss plan based on the user's body data and eating records.
userPrompt:
User info:
- Gender: {{gender}}, Age: {{age}}, Height: {{height}}cm, Weight: {{weight}}kg
- Activity level: {{activityLevel}}
- BMR: {{bmr}} kcal
- TDEE: {{tdee}} kcal
- Daily calorie target: {{dailyTarget}} kcal
- Avg intake (7 days): {{avgIntake}} kcal
- Avg burn (7 days): {{avgBurn}} kcal

Create a weekly fat loss plan with breakfast, lunch, dinner, snack suggestions and calories for each day, plus one exercise suggestion.
Requirements:
1. Daily total calories around {{dailyTarget}} kcal
2. Food suggestions should be specific, home-style, easy to prepare
3. Exercise should match the user's activity level
4. Include 3 fat loss tips

Return strictly as JSON, no other text:
{
  "weeklyPlan": [
    {
      "day": "Mon",
      "meals": [
        {"type": "breakfast", "suggestion": "specific food", "calories": 350},
        {"type": "lunch", "suggestion": "specific food", "calories": 450},
        {"type": "dinner", "suggestion": "specific food", "calories": 400},
        {"type": "snack", "suggestion": "specific food", "calories": 80}
      ],
      "exercise": {"suggestion": "exercise name duration", "duration": 30, "burnCalories": 150},
      "totalCalories": 1280
    }
  ],
  "tips": ["tip1", "tip2", "tip3"]
}
